items.name_en: Pochette Accessoires Series M82766 Uninspected Version
items.name_cn:
Pochette Accessoires Series M82766 Uninspected Version
❒ Size: 23.5*13.5*4cm ❒
A classic adaptation of the Mahjong bag, retaining the original style with a simple and elegant look. The portable carrying method and upgraded capacity meet the storage needs for essential items while traveling. Includes an extra internal pocket!
Small and lightweight, the chain strap design is eye-catching. A truly legendary piece!
Another blockbuster from the Fa Bao series; the design is truly top-tier!

items.name_en: Large [Overseas Factory Direct Exclusive Real Shot M41631 Large 40990]
items.name_cn:
Large [Overseas Factory Direct Exclusive Real Shot M41631 Large 40990]
🎀🎀Classic Shopping Bag💋💋Louis Vuitton New Neverfull, a fresh interpretation of the classic handbag, exploring exquisite details inside. The redesigned interior features a fresh fabric lining and retro details inspired by the Louis Vuitton archives, most notably the detachable zip pouch, which can be used alone as a chic clutch or as an extra pocket. The bright lining tone adds more vitality to the classic Monogram canvas.
Medium Size: (32*29*17)
Large Size: (40*33*20)

items.name_en: M41937 Burgundy! Made of top-grain calfskin! Rosalie coin purse features Monogram and Monogram Reverse canvas, with a smooth snap closure on a rounded flap. It has an interior slip pocket, a zip coin pocket, card slots, and a back slip pocket.
